zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Harington於1404年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾宏比 卡素時，她的父親Sir William Harington of Farleton38歲，母親Lady Margaret Neville49歲。她於大約1421年與Sir John Boteler在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Harington于1404年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾宏比 卡素时，她的父亲Sir William Harington of Farleton38岁，母亲Lady Margaret Neville49岁。她于大约1421年与Sir John Boteler在英国英格兰爾沃林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰爾沃林頓，埋葬在英国英格兰爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Harington was born in 1404, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Harington of Farleton, was 38 and her mother, Lady Margaret Neville, was 49. She married Sir John Boteler about 1421, in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Harington est née en 1404, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Harington of Farleton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Neville, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Boteler environ 1421, à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Warrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1421 in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Warrington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Haringtonが1404年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William Harington of Farletonは38歳，母Lady Margaret Nevilleは49歳であった。約1421年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンでSir John Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Harington(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Harington of Farleton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Neville(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에서 Sir John Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Boteler aproximadamente 1421, em Warrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Harington родилась в 1404 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Harington of Farleton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Neville, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Boteler около 1421 г. в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности варрингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
